recommendations.title: Kidulthood
recommendations.overview: A day in the life of a group of troubled 15-year-olds growing up in west London.

recommendations.title: Steve
recommendations.overview: Over one intense day, the devoted head teacher of a last-chance reform school strives to keep his students in line while facing pressures of his own.

recommendations.title: A Good Old Fashioned Orgy
recommendations.overview: A group of 30-year-olds who have been friends since high school attempt to throw an end-of-summer orgy.

recommendations.title: French Lover
recommendations.overview: When a jaded actor meets a down-on-her-luck waitress in Paris, their unexpected love story begins — but will it survive the glare of the spotlight?

recommendations.title: Like Sunday, Like Rain
recommendations.overview: A struggling musician becomes a 12-year-old musical prodigy's guardian for a summer.

recommendations.title: Moonrise Kingdom
recommendations.overview: Set on an island off the coast of New England in the summer of 1965, Moonrise Kingdom tells the story of two twelve-year-olds who fall in love, make a secret pact, and run away together into the wilderness. As various authorities try to hunt them dow

recommendations.title: What Will Become of Us
recommendations.overview: A coming-of-age tale about three 18-year-olds just out of high school who go to a Greek island following one of the boys' older girlfriend.

recommendations.title: Searching for Bobby Fischer
recommendations.overview: A seven-year-old chess prodigy refuses to harden himself in order to become a champion like the famous but unlikable Bobby Fischer.

recommendations.title: Room
recommendations.overview: Held captive for 7 years in an enclosed space, a woman and her young son finally gain their freedom, allowing the boy to experience the outside world for the first time.

recommendations.title: I Believe
recommendations.overview: A 9 year old boy experiences God's power in a supernatural way.
